acceptance_criteria.criterion: ProposeSplit(fileContent) -> topic-coherent [{newPath, sectionRanges}, ...] plan plus redirect summary, using segmentation LLM pathway
Returned plan's ranges partition content without gaps or overlaps
Malformed-response handling produces a clear, specific error (not a generic Exception)
Proactive defense against segment.py's open F1 finding (markdown-code-fence-wrapped JSON)
Call kwargs (model/temperature/max_tokens/timeout) forwarded verbatim to LLMClient.complete()
No Go/proto changes; engine/rpc's ProposeSplit Unimplemented stub is intentional and unaffected
covered_by: go test ./rpc/... -race -run TestRPCIntegration -v (ProposeSplit_Unimplemented subtest still PASS, unchanged)
go test ./... -race -count=1 (engine/, run twice; both green except the pre-existing tracked TestReaderDuringSplit flake on run 1, both green on run 2 -- confirms no new flakiness introduced)
